case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS MILNER, LISE M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $585.24 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT MILNER, LISE M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
